nasb.text: who have kept with Your servant, my father David, that which You have promised him; indeed, You have spoken with Your mouth and have fulfilled it with Your hand as it is this day.

esv.text: you have kept with your servant David my father what you declared to him. You spoke with your mouth, and with your hand have fulfilled it this day.

cnv.text: 你謹守了你應許過你僕人我父大衛的話。你親口說過，也親手作成，正如今天一樣。

ccb.text: 你持守向你仆人——我父大卫的应许，你曾亲口应许，你今天亲手成就了。
